title: Transcript:2020 Christmas event
wikitext:
{{Transcript|event}}
{{Transcript list|Scrubfoot|General Wartface|General Bentnoze|Goblin Cook|Grubfoot}}

==Before starting the event==
===Attempting to close doors at the Goblin Village===
* {{tbox|The door seems frozen in place.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Searching the Treasure chest===
* {{tbox|There is nothing of interest in there.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to enter the cave===
====Prior to a game update on 6 January 2021====
* '''Player:''' The cave smells funny. I'd rather not go in there without a good reason.
* {{tact|end}}

====After a game update on 6 January 2021 (post-event)====
* {{qact|The camera fades to black and player enters the cave.}}

===Scrubfoot at Goblin Village===
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot busy. Must scrub generals' feet.
* {{tact|end}}

===Grubfoot===
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello Grubfoot. Merry Christmas!
** '''Grubfoot:''' Grubfoot like Christmas. Grubfoot think it different from human Christmas. Goblins call it Gobmas.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

==Starting out==
===Speaking to Scrubfoot near the tree for the first time===
* '''Player:''' Hi. Who are you?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Me Scrubfoot. Me Grubfoot's twin.
* '''Player:''' Scrubfoot? What a strange name. What are you doing here?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot on mission for General Wartface and General Bentnoze.<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 0 -> 1 -->
* {{tact|continue}} <!-- continues from the state of varbit 11718 -->

===Speaking to Scrubfoot after learning about his mission===
<!-- If varbit 11718 >= 1 || varbit 11718 =< 5; he will not appear at the tree some time after speaking with generals and being "busy", while he may still appear at the Goblin Village if varbit 11726 == 0. -->
* '''Player:''' Hi again, Scrubfoot.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Hello.
* {{tact|continue}} <!-- continues from the state of varbit 11718 -->

===Learning from Scrubfoot more about his mission===
* '''Player:''' A mission? What kind of mission?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot not tell. Secret mission.
* '''Player:''' Secret? They must trust you a lot to send you on a secret mission.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Yes. Scrubfoot small so the humans no see Scrubfoot spying.<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 1 -> 2 -->
* {{tact|continue}} <!-- continues from the state of varbit 11718 -->

===Learning from Scrubfoot about Goblins' intent to steal Christmas===
* '''Player:''' Did you say you're spying on the humans?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Uh... no... Scrubfoot not say such things. Secret mission. Not talk about it.
* '''Player:''' You know. I could tell the goblin generals that you told me the secret.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' No! Human not do that! Scrubfoot needs to prove he worthy goblin.
* '''Player:''' If you tell me what you're doing here, I won't tell the generals.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Fine... Scrubfoot sent here to spy on humans. We find their weakness before great goblin invasion.
* '''Player:''' Invasion?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Yes. Goblins hear humans have Christmas. Christmas good. Goblins take it from humans.<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 2 -> 3 -->
* {{tact|continue}} <!-- continues from the state of varbit 11718 -->

===Confronting Scrubfoot after learning about stealing Christmas===
* {{topt|You can't just take Christmas. That's not how it works.}}
** '''Player:''' You can't just take Christmas. That's not how it works.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Yes. Goblins strong. Goblins take what goblins wants.
** '''Player:''' It's not just a physical thing you can take away from someone.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Human confusing. Goblins take Christmas from you first.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Why do the goblins want Christmas, anyway?}}
** '''Player:''' Why do the goblins want Christmas, anyway?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Christmas good. Humans say so. Christmas make humans happy. It too can make goblins happy.
** '''Player:''' That... actually makes sense. But you don't need to take away Christmas from the humans to celebrate it as well!
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Human silly. Goblins and humans not share Christmas. Only one can has it. And goblins stronger so goblins get it.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|cond=Only accessible after selecting option 1 or 2:|I have to stop this. I can't let you take Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' I have to stop this. I can't let you take Christmas. Even though you can't really take it because it's not a physical thing.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Human cannot stop goblins. Generals in Goblin Village not let human destroy great plan.
** '''Player:''' Goblin Village you say? I better head up there.<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 3 -> 5 -->
** '''Scrubfoot:''' No! Stop! Human not go there. And human not tell generals that Scrubfoot tell secret.
** '''Player:''' Human will do as human please.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|Goodbye.}}
** '''Player:''' Goodbye.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Goodbye human.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Scrubfoot at the event start location after learning of their plans===
<!-- He likely won't be here any longer if varbit 1178 is >= 6, should the player happen to talk to the generals and get called a "silly human". -->
* '''Player:''' Hi again, Scrubfoot.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Hello.
* '''Player:''' Where did you say the goblin generals were?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot not say anything about goblin generals in Goblin Village to the north. Also Scrubfoot not say anything about secret plan to steal Christmas.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' ... Oh no.
* '''Player:''' Thanks, Scrubfoot!
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Scrubfoot at the Goblin Village after his introduction, before speaking to the generals===
<!-- Requires varbit 11718 >= 1 && < 6; will not work with varbit 11718 == 0 || >= 6; in other words, not after General Bentnoze exclaims "Silly human!" and not before Scrubfoot introduces himself. -->
* '''Player:''' Hey, Scrubfoot. How did you make it up here so fast?
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot fast when Scrubfoot in trouble with generals. Run between village and humans a lot.
* {{tact|end}}

==Talking to the Generals==
''After the player has exclaimed to Scrubfoot earlier, "I better head up there."''

* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi, excuse me, I-
** '''General Wartface:''' Green armour for when we go to war!
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Noooo! Red armour! Big High War God said so.
** '''Player:''' Stop it, both of you! There's no need to go to war.
** '''General Wartface:''' Human funny! 'No need for war' - it joke.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Silly human!
<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 5 -> 6; Scrubfoot becomes busy at Goblin Village again and likely disappears from the tree location -->
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===Talking about Christmas, after being told to be a silly human===
* '''Player:''' I heard you are trying to take Christmas.
* '''General Wartface:''' Yes. Christmas good. We take it from humans.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' We take it so goblins happy. It great honour for Big High War God!
* '''General Wartface:''' We invade when we agree that colour for armour is green.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' No! We invade when we agree that colour for armour is red!
* '''General Wartface:''' No! Green armour!
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Red!
* '''Player:''' You will never agree on this. At this rate, I guess we will never have to worry about the invasion at all.
* '''Player:''' But stranger things have happened. Besides, you seem to not really know what Christmas is. Maybe I should teach you.
* '''General Wartface:''' Silly human think goblins not know Christmas.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Christmas good.
* {{tact|continue}}
<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 6 -> 7 -->

===Talking about Christmas, after being told goblins know and enjoy Christmas===
* {{topt|If you know Christmas so well...}}
** '''Player:''' If you know Christmas so well, name one thing you do during that time?
** '''General Wartface:''' Uhhh.. the uhh... the fighting!
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Yes, the fighting! And the uh... the pillaging?
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|What's your favourite thing about Christmas?}}
** '''Player:''' What's your favourite thing about Christmas?
** '''General Wartface:''' Uhh... General Wartface not know. It all good.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Christmas good. It hard to pick one favourite thing.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|cond=If the player has previously selected option 1 or 2 in this conversation:|You don't know anything about Christmas, do you?}}
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{topt|Goodbye.}}
** '''Player:''' Goodbye.
** '''General Wartface:''' Bye human.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Bye-bye.
** {{tact|end}}

===Talking about Christmas, after confronting the generals' knowledge===
* '''Player:''' You don't know anything about Christmas, do you? <!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 7 -> 8 -->
* '''General Wartface:''' Goblins not need to know about it.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' All goblins know is humans has it and humans say it good. So we take it. Goblins deserve good.
* '''Player:''' I guess you do deserve good, just like everyone else. Why don't I teach you about Christmas?
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Teach goblins? War easy. Learning hard.
* '''Player:''' I'll teach you about Christmas and help you celebrate it in your own way. In return you don't invade the humans. Deal?
* '''General Bentnoze:''' General Bentnoze not think this work.
* '''General Wartface:''' General Wartface say goblins try. And when it no work, goblins invade humans.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Yes, then goblins invade.
* '''Player:''' Sigh. Guess it's worth a try.
<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 8 -> 10 -->
* {{tact|continue}}

===Talking about Christmas, teaching the generals about Christmas===
* {{topt|Talk about decorations.}}
** '''Player:''' Let's talk about decorations. Around Christmas we like to decorate things to make them look pretty and feel festive.
** '''General Wartface:''' Goblins not care for pretty.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Pretty is puny. Goblins need power!
** '''Player:''' Well, you can decorate with things you like. People typically use fairy lights and stockings, to name a few.
** '''General Wartface:''' Sockings? Goblins have socks. Goblins put socks on things?
** '''Player:''' That's not quite what I-
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Stinky sockings! Human so funny.
** '''Player:''' Aren't there other things you maybe would want to decorate with?
** '''General Bentnoze:''' In cave below village are glowy flying lights.
** '''General Wartface:''' Oh yes glowy lights. Scrubfoot! Go get green glowy lights.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Y-yes, at once, General Wartface.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' No! Scrubfoot bring red lights!
** '''General Wartface:''' It too late! Scrubfoot already gone. <!-- Varbit 11726 changed: 0 -> 1. Scrubfoot becomes invisible at Goblin Village. -->
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Human! Go get red lights before Scrubfoot! They in cave below village.
** '''Player:''' I'll see what I can do.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about trees.}}
** '''Player:''' One of the highlights of Christmas is the Christmas tree. Typically we take a large tree - like a pine - into our house and decorate it nicely.
** '''General Wartface:''' Tree? Goblins not like trees.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' They stinky and green.
** '''Player:''' Well if you don't like trees, perhaps we could decorate something else. Is there something around here you think would make a good centrepiece?
** '''General Wartface:''' As long as it not tree, General Wartface happy.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Above village goblins have sacred boulder. Goblins go there sometimes to look at boulder.
** '''General Wartface:''' Oh yes, sacred boulder! Big High War God place it there. It look like goblin so it symbol of goblin world domination!
** '''Player:''' While I highly doubt that, I will go take a look at this boulder. <!-- Varbit 11724 changed: 0 -> 1 -->
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about gifts.}}
** '''Player:''' An important part of Christmas - some would actually say it's the most important part - is gifts.
** '''General Wartface:''' General Wartface loves gifts!
** '''General Bentnoze:''' General Bentnoze too. And taking gifts from others. That good too.
** '''Player:''' Well, around Christmas we tend to focus more on giving rather than receiving. We call it the gift of giving.
** '''General Wartface:''' Give? No. No give. Only get.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Yes, only get. And take. It the goblin way.
** '''Player:''' OK let's see. What if, to start with, you give yourselves a present? General Wartface will give one to himself, and General Bentnoze, you give one to yourself.
** '''Player:''' That way you still get a present, but we can practice giving one away. Sound good?
** '''General Wartface:''' Human weird. But General Wartface loves gifts.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' General Bentnoze wants good gift! Better than General Wartface gift.
** '''Player:''' What in particular would you like?
** '''General Wartface:''' Goblins keep treasures in village. Goblins like Big High War God, meat and powerful things.
** '''Player:''' OK. I'll bring you your own presents to give to yourself. This isn't weird at all.
** '''General Wartface:''' Hurry up, human! Me wants gift now. <!-- Varbit 11725 changed: 0 -> 1 -->
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about food.}}
** '''Player:''' A way to really get into the festive mood is to have delicious food that you only eat around this time of year.
** '''General Wartface:''' General Wartface likes food.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' That obvious. General Wartface has big belly.
** '''General Wartface:''' Me not fat! Me just has powerful belly.
** '''Player:''' What kind of food do you goblins like?
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Me like meat!
** '''General Wartface:''' Me like eyes.
** '''Player:''' Eyes?
** '''General Wartface:''' Yes. With cream.
** '''Player:''' Eyes, cream. I see. I'll have a look in the kitchens and see if I can find anything to cook for you. <!-- Varbit 11727 changed: 0 -> 1 -->
** '''General Wartface:''' Goblins have kitchen here in village.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Mudknuckles in there.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Goodbye.}}
** {{tact|above}}

===Talking about Christmas, after telling them about it===
* {{topt|Talk about decorations.}}
** '''General Wartface:''' Did human get the green glowy lights yet?
** '''Player:''' No, not yet.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Human get the red ones! In cave below village.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about trees.}}
** '''General Wartface:''' Did human find boulder?
** '''Player:''' No, not yet.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Sacred boulder is on ledge above village.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about gifts.}}
** '''General Wartface:''' Did human find gifts yet?
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Goblin gifts from the treasures in village?
** '''Player:''' No, I didn't find you appropriate gifts yet.
** {{tcond|If the player has not yet selected 3 items that goblins like:}}<!--varbit 11725 == 1. Oddly enough the following lines are omitted when 11725 == 2 (after finding the gifts and destroying them from the player's inventory).-->
*** '''General Wartface:''' Sad.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Maybe goblins invade after all.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Talk about food.}}
** '''General Wartface:''' Did human cook delicious meal?
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Is it tasty? Is it scrumptious?
** '''Player:''' I haven't finished cooking yet.
** '''Goblin Wartface:''' Goblins have kitchen here in village.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Mudknuckles in there.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|Goodbye.}}
** {{tact|above}}

===Talking to Scrubfoot at the Goblin Village, after the player gets called a "silly human" by General Bentnoze and before he runs away===
<!-- Varbit 11718 should now be >= 6, after talking to the generals; this dialogue is identical to pre-event (varbit 11718 == 0) and remains so until Scrubfoot is met once again inside the cave later. Assuming varbit 11726 == 0, to have Scrubfoot is still available at Goblin Village. -->
* '''Player:''' Hello.
* '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot busy. Must scrub generals' feet.
* {{tact|end}}

==Inside the cave==
===Entering the cave for the first time after Scrubfoot===
====Prior to a game update on 6 January 2021====
* '''Player:''' Scrubfoot must have passed through here.<!-- Varbit 11726 changed: 1 -> 2. This is only displayed the first time, when varbit 11726 has a value of 1. -->
* {{tact|end}}

====After a game update on 6 January 2021 (post-event)====
* {{tact|No message.}}

===Attempting to sled down the slope without the sled equipped===
====On 9 December 2020====
<!--Sled glitch. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u7oK1zeacQ0-->
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full, the player has a sled in their inventory, and the player's both hands are equipped:}}
** You don't have enough free inventory space to do that.
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tact|The player is taken just down the slope near the start.}}

====After a hotfix on 9 December 2020====
* '''Player:''' This looks pretty steep. But if Scrubfoot went down here, so can I!
* '''Player:''' It looks too steep to go down by foot. Maybe I could find something to slide down with.
* {{tact|end}}

====After a game update on or around 10 December 2020====
* '''Player:''' It looks too steep to go down by foot. Maybe I could find something to slide down with.
* {{tact|end}}

===Picking up a sled===
* {{tcond|If the player has a sled:}}<!--also even if the player's inventory is full-->
** {{tbox|You already have a sled. There's really no need to get another.}}<!--for clarity, the player doesn't receive duplicates with one in their inventory-->
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** {{mes|You pick up a sled. There seems to be more available, should you ever lose it.}}<!--Filtered by game chat (spam).-->
** {{tact|receives=[[Sled (2020 Christmas event)|Sled]]}}
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** You don't have enough inventory space to do that.

===Sledding down the slope with the sled equipped===
====After a hotfix on 9 December 2020====
* '''Player:''' This looks pretty steep. But if Scrubfoot went down here, so can I!
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tact|The player is taken just down the slope near the start.}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

====After a game update on or around 10 December 2020====
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tact|The player is taken just down the slope near the start.}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}
<!-- This is, indeed, a race. After starting the race, varbit 11731 starts counting every tick from 0 upwards, until starting to jump the slope end. -->

===Sledding over ice===
<!--There is no examine text.-->
* {{Colour|#0dc10d|The ice greatly increases your speed.}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat for the first game tick the player enters the tile; tick 1. Strongqueue.-->
* {{tact|The player's movement speed increases to a running speed for the next 10 game ticks, and the player restores 20 run energy on the first game tick on the ice. Any open interfaces are closed.}}
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the player stays on the ice:}}
** {{Colour|#0dc10d|The ice greatly increases your speed.}}<!--Filtered by game chat. Spammed in game chat every tick the player stands on the ice tile, and doesn't restore 20 run energy. Reset to tick 1. Strongqueue in the sense this closes interfaces; weakqueue in the sense the spam dissipates when moving away from the tile.-->
** {{tact|The player's speed boost restarts counting for 10 game ticks. Any open interfaces are closed.}}
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the speed boost ends naturally:}}<!--Not if the player exits the sled race early.-->
** Your speed boost has ended.<!--Normal queue; tick 10.-->
** {{tact|The player's movement speed decreases to a walking speed.}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player goes on rocks during the speed boost:}}
** {{tact|below}}

===Sledding over rocks===
<!-- Examine: Rocks frozen into the ice. Those are bound to slow down any sled passing over it.-->
* {{Colour|#ef1020|You sled over some rocks and they seem to get stuck under your sled. This will slow you down!}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat; tick 1. Strongqueue.-->
* {{tact|The player's increased movement speed from ice ends, and the player is slowed down for 10 game ticks. Any open interfaces are closed.}}
* {{tcond|If the player sleds on rocks while the slowdown from rocks is active:}}
** {{Colour|#ef1020|You sled over some rocks and they seem to get stuck under your sled.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; reset to tick 1. Strongqueue in the sense this closes interfaces; weakqueue in the sense the spam dissipates when moving away from the tile.-->
** {{tact|The player's slowdown effect from rocks restarts counting for 10 game ticks. Any open interfaces are closed.}}
* {{tcond|If the player sleds on the ice while slowdown from rocks is active:}}
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 2.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 3.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 4.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 5.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 6.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 7.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 8.-->
** {{mes|The rocks under your sled prevent you from gaining more speed on the ice.}}<!--Filtered by game chat; tick 9.-->
** {{tact|Any open interfaces are closed while this happens.}}
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the slowdown ends naturally:}}<!--Not if the player exits the sled race early.-->
** {{tbox|You get rid of the rocks from under your sled. Time to pick up some speed.}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat; tick 10. This message doesn't allow gaining more speed yet; it can only be acquired on the next game tick. Normal queue.-->
** {{tact|The player gains the ability to get speed on ice the next (11th) game tick.}}<!--Tick 11. Normal queue.-->
** {{tact|end}}

===Leaving the sled race early===
* {{tbox|You make it back to the top of the slope.}}
* {{tact|The player is taken next to the top of the slope.}}<!-- World Location: 1964, 6226, 3 -->
* {{tact|end}}

===Jumping the slope end===
<!-- Examine: This doesn't look safe, but there are hardly any options at this point.-->
====Prior to a game update on 22 December 2020====
<!--Remember there was a varbit timer before the update, but it was not saved - or at least displayed - anywhere.-->
* '''Player:''' {{overhead|Woohoo!}}
* {{tact|continue}}

====After a game update on 22 December 2020====
* {{tbox|If the player has not given fireflies to the generals yet:}}<!--Varbit 11726 == 2-->
** {{tact|No message.}}
* {{tbox|If the player has given fireflies to the generals, but not finished the event and claimed the rewards:}}<!--Varbit 11726 == 3 && varbit 11718 < 15. That's right, the player has to claim rewards to unlock time tracking (and thus be > 24 hours old real time). Teaching everything about Christmas (varbit 11718 == 14) is not enough. -->
** {{mes|Maybe after helping the goblins you can sled more and track how fast you race.}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat.-->
* {{tcond|If the player has finished the event and claimed the rewards:}}
** {{tcond|If the player had a new personal best time in the race:}}
*** New personal best: {{Colour|#ef1020|X:XX}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat.-->
** {{tcond|Else:}}
*** You completed the race in: {{Colour|#ef1020|X:XX}}. Personal best: X:XX<!--Unfiltered by game chat.-->
* '''Player:''' {{overhead|Woohoo!}}
* {{tact|continue}}

====After a game update on 6 January 2021 (post-event)====
* {{tcond|If the player had a new personal best time in the race:}}
** New personal best: {{Colour|#ef1020|X:XX}}<!--Unfiltered by game chat.-->
* {{tcond|Else:}}
** You completed the race in: {{Colour|#ef1020|X:XX}}. Personal best: X:XX<!--Unfiltered by game chat.-->
* '''Player:''' {{overhead|Woohoo!}}
* {{tact|continue}}

===Aftering landing the sweet jump===
====Prior to a game update on 6 January 2021====
* {{tbox|You land softly in a pile of snow at the bottom of the slope.}}
* {{tact|The player's sled is unequipped. If the player had no inventory space for a sled, it is silently destroyed in the process.}}<!--Yeah, no game message.-->
* '''Player:''' The 'glowy flying things'... they're fireflies!
* {{tact|end}}

====After a game update on 6 January 2021 (post-event)====
* {{tbox|You land softly in a pile of snow at the bottom of the slope.}}
* {{tact|end}}

===Talking to Scrubfoot===
* {{topt|Scrubfoot, are you okay?}}
** '''Player:''' Scrubfoot, are you okay?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Ugh... no. Scrubfoot can't move.
** '''Player:''' I'm sorry. Sledding is dangerous business.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' That it is. It also dangerous business going back to generals without glowy flying things.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|How do I get out of here?}}
** '''Player:''' How do I get out of here?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Over by water there is crack in the wall.
** '''Player:''' Thanks. Will you make it out by yourself?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot needs a minute before moving.
** '''Player:''' Good luck with that.
** {{tact|other}}
* {{topt|What were you doing here?}}
** '''Player:''' What were you doing here?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' General Wartface send Scrubfoot to get green glowy flying things.
** '''Player:''' I guess you won't be able to get the green ones now.
** '''Scrubfoot:''' It not matter. If Scrubfoot get green fireflies, General Bentnoze kick Scrubfoot. If not get green fireflies, General Wartface kick Scrubfoot.
** '''Player:''' Seems like you can't win with those generals. What if you got them both green and red?
** '''Scrubfoot:''' Scrubfoot never tried that.
** {{tact|other}}

===Squeezing-through crevice without fireflies in the player's inventory===
* '''Player:''' I should get some fireflies of each colour to keep the generals happy.
* {{topt|Yes.}}
** {{tact|The player leaves anyway.}}
* {{topt|No.}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Catching a firefly===
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** You manage to catch a firefly.<!--Not filtered by game chat-->
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** You'll need to clear some space in your inventory to catch these fireflies.<!--Not filtered by game chat-->

===Exiting the cave===
<!--This is via the cave exit, possibly via teleportation. The crevice has no message.-->
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** {{mes|You remove the sled.}}<!--Game chat message, not filtered by game chat filter.-->
** {{qact|The sled is unequipped and placed to the player's inventory. The player leaves the cave.}}
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** {{mes|You remove the sled. It's destroyed in the process.}}<!--Game chat message, not filtered by game chat filter.-->
** {{qact|The sled is removed from the player. The player leaves the cave.}}

==Moving the boulder==
===Without the stick===
* '''Player:''' So this is their sacred boulder. It kind of looks like a potato.
* '''Player:''' I wonder if there's a way I can roll it into the village.
* {{tact|end}}

===Picking up the stick===
* {{tcond|If the player already has a stick:}}
** {{mes|You already have a stick. You can only use one at a time.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat.-->
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** {{mes|You don't have enough inventory space to do that.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat.-->
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** {{mes|You pick up a stick.}}<!--Filtered by game chat (spam).-->
** {{tact|receives=[[Stick (2020 Christmas event)|Stick]]}}

===With the stick===
* '''Player:''' So this is their sacred boulder. It kind of looks like a potato.
* '''Player:''' I wonder if there's a way I can roll it into the village.
* '''Player:''' Maybe I can use the stick I picked up to roll it. The boulder would make a good centrepiece, sort of like a Christmas tree.
* {{topt|Yes}}
** The boulder rolls down the hill, into the village. One goblin barely dodges it as it rolls past. <!-- not filtered by game chat filter -->
** Your stick breaks in the process. <!-- filtered by game chat filter -->
<!-- Varbit 11724 changed: 1 -> 2 -->
<!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 10 -> 11 -->
<!-- Stick can no longer be picked up from the ground. -->
* {{topt|No}}
** {{tact|end}}

===Using the stick on the boulder===
* '''Player:''' Maybe I can use the stick I picked up to roll it. The boulder would make a good centrepiece, sort of like a Christmas tree.
* {{tact|above}}

===Inspecting the boulder in Goblin Village===
<!--This is the undecorated version.-->
* {{mes|A large, potato-shaped boulder.}}<!-- Not filtered by game chat.-->
<!-- |examine=Sacred to the goblins. -->

==Searching the Treasure chest==
* '''Player:''' Let's see. I need to pick out the items from here that the goblins will like the most.
* {{tact|opens2=Treasure chest}} <!-- Varbit 11729 changes according to the location of the correct item on screen. 0 = left, 1 = middle, 2 = right. -->

===Selecting a correct item===
* '''Player:''' That seems like a good goblin gift. I should get some more. <!-- Varbit 11730 increases by 1, until it reaches 3 and this part of the event is "good enough for the goblin generals". -->
* {{tact|opens2=Treasure chest}}

===Selecting an incorrect item===
* '''Player:''' That doesn't seem like the best gift for a goblin. I should get some typical goblin items. I know they like things like meat, fighting and 'Big High War God.'
* {{tact|opens2=Treasure chest}}

===Upon selecting 3 items that goblins like===
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** '''Player:''' That should be good enough for the goblin generals. I hope they will like what I got them. <!-- Varbit 11725 changed: 1 -> 2. This message replaces the above message for a correct item when varbit 11730's value equals to 3 (the previous correct item message is then not displayed). -->
** {{tact|receives=[[Goblin gifts]]}}
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** '''Player:''' That's all of them. I don't have space in my inventory for the gifts though. I should come back with more space.<!-- Varbit 11725 changed: 1 -> 2. -->
** The gifts you selected remain in the chest, ready to be picked up when you have space for them.<!--Not filtered by game chat-->

===Searching the chest with a full inventory===
* {{mes|The gifts you selected are still there but you have no space for them.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat-->

===Searching the chest after the player has cleared inventory space, or destroyed the goblin gifts===
* {{mes|You pick up the gifts you selected earlier.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat-->
* {{tact|receives=Goblin gifts}}

===With goblin gifts in the player's inventory===
* {{mes|You already have some gifts. Perhaps you should bring them back to the goblin generals.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat.-->

===After gifting goblin gifts to the generals===
* {{mes|There is nothing of interest in there.}}<!--Not filtered by game chat.-->

==Cooking their food==
===Talking to the Goblin Cook initially===
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello. I need to make a great feast for Christmas, on behalf of the generals.
** {{tcond|If the player has blown up the cauldron during [[Recipe for Disaster]] Goblin generals subquest:}}
*** '''Goblin Cook:''' Generals say so? Mudknuckles help. Human can use cauldron over there. It new one after previous one blew up.
** {{tcond|Else:}}
*** '''Goblin Cook:''' Generals say so? Mudknuckles help. Human can use cauldron over there.
** '''Player:''' Great! Is there any ingredients I can use?
** {{tcond|If the player has blown up the cauldron during [[Recipe for Disaster]] Goblin generals subquest:}}
*** '''Goblin Cook:''' Most of igredients{{sic}} burn. Maybe some left in boxes 'round kitchen.
** {{tcond|Else:}}
*** '''Goblin Cook:''' Goblins already eat most ingredients. Maybe some left in boxes 'round kitchen.
** '''Player:''' Thanks. I'll see what I can find.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===Searching the shelves===
* {{tcond|If the player has [[Mouldy sawdust]] in their inventory, before putting it in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' Mouldy sawdust? I already have some with me. Maybe I could cook it somewhere.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has already put Mouldy sawdust in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' I already put a Mouldy sawdust in the cauldron. One should do.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't have Mouldy sawdust in their inventory and the player's inventory is full:}}
** '''Player:''' There seems to be something useful here but I don't have the space for it.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't have Mouldy sawdust in their inventory:}}
** {{tact|You find some Mouldy sawdust.}}
** '''Player:''' Ewww, it smells!
** {{tact|end}}

===Searching the sacks===
* {{tcond|If the player has [[Rotten meat]] in their inventory, before putting it in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' Rotten meat? I already have some with me. Maybe I could cook it somewhere.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has already put Rotten meat in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' I already put a Rotten meat in the cauldron. One should do.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't have Rotten meat in their inventory and the player's inventory is full:}}
** '''Player:''' There seems to be something useful here but I don't have the space for it.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't have Rotten meat in their inventory:}}
** {{tact|You find some Rotten meat.}}
** '''Player:''' Ewww, it smells!
** {{tact|end}}

===Searching the cupboard===
* {{tcond|If the player has [[Stale bread]] in their inventory, before putting it in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' Stale bread? I already have some with me. Maybe I could cook it somewhere.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player has already put Rotten meat in the cauldron:}}
** '''Player:''' I already put a Rotten meat in the cauldron. One should do.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player doesn't have Stale bread in their inventory and the player's inventory is full:}}
** '''Player:''' There seems to be something useful here but I don't have the space for it.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player does not have Stale bread:}}
** {{tact|You find some Stale bread.}}
** '''Player:''' Ewww, it smells!
** {{tact|end}}

===Inspecting the cauldron===
* {{tcond|Initially:}}
** '''Player:''' This would be useful for cooking the meal for the generals. I could probably use some of the ingredients I found.
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{tcond|If the player does not have the necessary ingredients at any point to finish the stew:}}
** '''Player:''' It's not quite ready yet. I need to find more ingredients.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|For each appropriate ingredient added to the cauldron:}}<!--The order of lines is as in the dialogue, not in the player's inventory order.-->
** '''Player:''' This meat is disgusting but... the goblins seem to like this sort of thing. <!-- Varbit 11728 changed: 0 -> 2 -->
** {{tact|The player puts rotten meat in the cauldron.}}
** '''Player:''' A sprinkle of sawdust... Gross. <!-- Varbit 11728 changed: 2 -> 3 -->
** {{tact|The player puts mouldy sawdust in the cauldron.}}
** '''Player:''' I wonder how old this bread is. But oh well, in it goes. <!-- Varbit 11728 changed: 3 -> 7; the player still tells the Goblin Generals it hasn't been finished cooking yet, because varbit 11727 remains at value 1 until the next dialogue. -->
** {{tact|The player puts stale bread in the cauldron.}}
** {{tact|continue}}

===Acquiring a bowl of Goblin stew from the cauldron===
====After all three ingredients have been once placed, the player doesn't have a Goblin stew and it has not been served to generals====
* {{tcond|If the player has inventory space:}}
** '''Player:''' Yuck, this food smells terrible! Hopefully this should do it. I need to bring this back to the generals. <!-- Varbit 11727 changed: 1 -> 2; the shelves / sacks / cupboard no longer have a search option. -->
** {{tact|receives=[[Goblin stew]]}}
** {{tact|end}}
* {{tcond|If the player's inventory is full:}}
** '''Player:''' I should free up some space so I can bring this stew-like food to the generals.
** {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to inspect the cauldron with Goblin stew in the player's inventory===
* '''Player:''' I already have some food with me. I should bring it to the generals.
* {{tact|end}}

===Attempting to eat the stew===
* '''Player:''' I wouldn't eat that even if I got paid for it.
* {{tact|end}}

===Showing the stew to the Goblin Cook===
<!-- If varbit 11727 == 2 -->
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' Hello. I cooked this meal for the generals but I'm not sure if it's any good.
** '''Goblin Cook:''' Mudknuckles will try.
** '''Goblin Cook:''' This good stuff!
** '''Player:''' Thanks. I hope the generals will like it too.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===Showing the stew to the Goblin Cook again before serving it to the generals===
<!-- If varbit 11727 == 2 and varbit 11733 == 1 -->
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Goblin Cook:''' What human waiting for? Bring food to generals before they beat Mudknuckles!
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===Talking to Goblin Cook after the goblin stew has been served to the generals===
<!-- If varbit 11727 == 3 -->
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Goblin Cook:''' Human! Is there more of the delicious food?
** '''Player:''' I gave it to the generals and they loved it.
** '''Goblin Cook:''' Mudknuckles needs this recipe.
** '''Player:''' I just put in whatever I could find.
** {{tact|end}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

==Completing the tasks==
===Completing the steps but not having the items to show for it===
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** {{topt|Talk about decorations.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Green glowy things!
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' No, red glowy things!
*** {{tcond|If the player has only one coloured fireflies in the player's inventory:}}
**** '''Player:''' They will never agree on one. Perhaps I should get them some of each colour.
**** {{tact|end}}
*** {{tcond|If the player has both coloured fireflies in the player's inventory:}}
**** '''Player:''' I brought you these fireflies. I mean uh... glowy things.
**** '''General Wartface:''' They not all green!
**** '''General Bentnoze:''' And they not all red!
**** '''Player:''' I got some of both.
**** '''General Wartface:''' General Bentnoze not get all his red glowy things. I OK with this.
**** '''General Bentnoze:''' It not all green so General Wartface not happy. It OK with me. We get more red glowy things later. <!-- Varbit 11726 changed: 2 -> 3; this is also when the fireflies get removed from the player's inventory. Fireflies can no longer be caught. -->
**** {{tact|All fireflies are removed from the player's inventory.}}
**** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about trees.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Did human find boulder?
*** '''Player:''' I did. I pushed it into the village and it's now ready to be decorated.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Now sacred boulder closer to goblins. It good so not more goblins fall down when go up to boulder to look.
*** '''Player:''' Glad I could help. <!-- Varbit 11724 changed: 2 -> 3 -->
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about gifts.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Did human find gifts yet?
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Goblin gifts from the treasures in village?
*** {{tact|The player loses the Goblin gifts.}}
*** '''Player:''' Yes, I have them here. <!-- Varbit 11725 changed: 2 -> 3; the Goblin gifts are removed from the player's inventory. -->
*** '''General Wartface:''' Ooh gift for me! I shouldn't have.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' For me too! I the best.
*** '''Player:''' Ehem. Yeah, you're welcome. So now you've learnt about giving. Next time maybe you can give something to someone else?
*** '''General Wartface:''' Give to someone else? Human silly.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Me accept gifts from human next time too.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about food.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Did human cook delicious meal?
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Is it tasty? Is it scrumptious?
*** {{tcond|If the player does not have the stew they made:}}
**** '''Player:''' I made some food but it's still in the kitchen. I'll go get it from the cauldron.
**** {{tact|other}}
*** {{tcond|If the player does not have the stew:}}
**** {{tact|The player loses the Goblin stew.}}
**** '''Player:''' I did! Here you go, have a taste. <!-- Varbit 11727 changed: 2 -> 3; the Goblin kitchen's cauldron also reverts back to pre-event state. The Goblin stew is removed from the player's inventory. -->
**** {{qact|The generals try some of the pugnant stew.}}
**** '''General Wartface:''' This good!
**** '''General Bentnoze:''' Very crunchable. Me have more?
**** '''General Wartface:''' Yes, human cook more!
**** '''Player:''' Wow, you actually like it? That's weird... but good for you.
**** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Goodbye.}}
*** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===After showing the items===
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** {{topt|Talk about decorations.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Human help goblins with glowy things.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' And human teach goblins about sockings! Humans have weird traditions.
*** '''Player:''' You're welcome.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about trees.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' General Wartface likes boulder in village.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' General Bentnoze too.
*** '''Player:''' [Player's name] is glad goblins are happy.<!-- the player talks about self in third-person. -->
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about gifts.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' General Wartface got best Christmas gift.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' No! General Bentnoze did.
*** '''General Wartface:''' No, me!
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' No, me!
*** '''Player:''' You both got good gifts, OK? Obviously someone really thoughtful put great effort into finding you good ones.<!-- angry chathead -->
*** '''General Wartface:''' Yes, me good at getting gifts.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' Me better.
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Talk about food.}}
*** '''General Wartface:''' Human cooked delicious meal. Me want it every day.
*** '''General Bentnoze:''' We can has Christmas every day?
*** '''Player:''' If we had Christmas every day it wouldn't feel so special anymore.
*** '''General Wartface:''' But it good!
*** {{tact|other}}
** {{topt|Goodbye.}}
*** {{tact|above}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}

===Upon finishing the last dialogue for confirming items===
* {{qact|The boulder in the centre of Goblin Village becomes decorated.}}
* '''Player:''' I think I've taught you everything I can about Christmas. How do you feel about it now? <!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 11 -> 12. -->
* '''General Wartface:''' Human has weird traditions. But me not want to invade today.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Goblin Christmas superior to human Christmas. Also belly too full to invade now.
* '''Player:''' That's reassuring, I suppose. Merry Christmas, you lot!
* '''General Wartface:''' To thank human we grant human access to caves beneath village. Human slide to the glowy things.
* '''General Bentnoze:''' Also human can has small boulder from us.
* '''Player:''' Thanks, you two. I appreciate it. <!-- Varbit 11718 changed: 12 -> 14 -->
* {{tact|continue}}

===Inspecting the boulder in Goblin Village===
<!--This is the decorated version. Varbit 11718 >= 12. -->

==Claiming rewards==
===If the player didn't claim rewards the first time===
<!--if varbit 11718 == 14-->
* {{topt|Talk about Christmas.}}
** '''Player:''' Hi again. Do you have anything for me for helping you out with Christmas?
** '''General Wartface:''' Goblin not give. Goblin take.
** '''General Bentnoze:''' Exactly. But we have spare boulder and decorations. Human can throw it away for goblins.
** {{tact|continue}}
* {{topt|event=No|Talk about something else.}}
